raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a XXXX XXXX carbon fiber steering wheel trim from XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> for {$290.00}. The company sent me a defective product, and then replaced it with another defective/damaged product and stopped communicating with me. I filed a dispute with Citi Bank, and they failed to conduct a thorough and fair investigation, leaving me out {$290.00} and with a defective/damaged product. 

Summary of issue : The original item received was defective ( misaligned/miscut and did not function properly with steering wheel buttons ). 
The merchant acknowledged the issue and sent a replacement after I returned the original item. 
The replacement item, received XX/XX/year>, was also defective. It had a broken mounting tab on the back, causing the trim to be misaligned/popping out and not be properly attached. 

Attempts to resolve : I contacted the merchant on XX/XX/year>, XXXX, requesting a return and refund, including photos of the defect. 
I followed up again on XX/XX/year>. 
I attempted to call the merchant once on XX/XX/XXXX and twice on XX/XX/XXXX using the phone number listed on their website, XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, I did get through on XXXX of my calls but was told the number was not correct. This was the same number I had contacted them on for the replacement of the first defective item I received no response to any communication attempt. 

Important clarification : The dispute appears to have been denied because the merchant stated I still have the item. This is correct ; however, I have been unable to return it due to the merchants failure to provide return authorization or instructions despite my multiple outreach attempts. 

I remain fully willing to return the defective item upon receiving proper return instructions and a return shipping label. 

Conclusion : The merchandise is defective, and the merchant has been unresponsive, preventing resolution. Under these circumstances, I am requesting that the charge be reversed. 

I can provide : Photos of the defect Copies of all email communications Call attempt details Thank you for your reconsideration.
